title: Equatorial Coca-Cola Bottling
description: [AI generated] Equatorial Coca-Cola Bottling Company is a beverage manufacturer and distributor operating primarily in West and Central Africa, including countries such as Cameroon and Equatorial Guinea. It produces and distributes Coca-Cola branded soft drinks and related beverages under license from The Coca-Cola Company. The company operates within the non-alcoholic beverage industry, managing bottling plants and regional distribution networks across its operating territories.
